title: nidorella auriculata
intro: Nidorella auriculata, also known as Golden-leaved Nidorella or False Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nidorella auriculata include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
